BENE_HI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS 
LABEL: 
Part A Months Count 
DESCRIPTION: Months of Part A coverage. 
LONG NAME: BENE_HI_CVRAGE_TOT_MONS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) (derived) 
VALUES: 
0–12 
COMMENT: 
This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary had Medicare Part A
